Re-export the stable GRACE public API for library callers and shell-driven tooling.
Expose a thin CLI over GRACE core APIs for file-level and repo-level agent workflows.
Implement a minimal Go language adapter that proves GRACE adapter architecture scales to a third language without changing core semantics.
Compute deterministic reverse-dependency impact sets over a derived GraceMap.
Define the language adapter contract that lets GRACE parse annotated files through language-specific integrations while keeping core semantics unchanged.
Emit soft policy warnings about maintainability, machine utility, and LLM-friendly block granularity for parsed GRACE models.

Parse inline GRACE annotations from Python source into typed file models.
Replace semantic blocks by anchor_id while preserving identity and enforcing parse-validate rollback discipline.
Load derived patch plans and apply them as deterministic sequences of semantic block replacements.
Build deterministic patch-plan proposals from existing semantic graph data without executing changes or inferring edits.
Implement the reference Python language adapter that parses inline GRACE annotations and emits GraceFileModel data without changing core semantics.
Provide deterministic read-only graph queries over derived GRACE maps for agent navigation.
Extract deterministic anchor-local context from parsed GRACE files and derived maps without reading whole modules at the agent layer.
Provide minimal Tree-sitter substrate helpers for non-Python pilot adapters without changing GRACE core semantics.

Enforce hard structural and semantic consistency rules over parsed GRACE file models.
